mapper.select: SELECT id, opening_order_id, user_id, symbol, side, quantity, entry_price, leverage, margin, margin_mode, liquidation_price, take_profit_price, stop_loss_price, close_price, close_reason, realized_pnl, status, opened_at, closed_at, updated_at FROM t_position WHERE opening_order_id = #{openingOrderId}

SELECT id, opening_order_id, user_id, symbol, side, quantity, entry_price, leverage, margin, margin_mode, liquidation_price, take_profit_price, stop_loss_price, close_price, close_reason, realized_pnl, status, opened_at, closed_at, updated_at FROM t_position WHERE id = #{positionId} AND user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, opening_order_id, user_id, symbol, side, quantity, entry_price, leverage, margin, margin_mode, liquidation_price, take_profit_price, stop_loss_price, close_price, close_reason, realized_pnl, status, opened_at, closed_at, updated_at FROM t_position WHERE id = #{positionId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, opening_order_id, user_id, symbol, side, quantity, entry_price, leverage, margin, margin_mode, liquidation_price, take_profit_price, stop_loss_price, close_price, close_reason, realized_pnl, status, opened_at, closed_at, updated_at FROM t_position WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY opened_at DESC

SELECT id, opening_order_id, user_id, symbol, side, quantity, entry_price, leverage, margin, margin_mode, liquidation_price, take_profit_price, stop_loss_price, close_price, close_reason, realized_pnl, status, opened_at, closed_at, updated_at FROM t_position WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY symbol ASC, opened_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_position ( id, opening_order_id, user_id, symbol, side, quantity, entry_price, leverage, margin, margin_mode, liquidation_price, take_profit_price, stop_loss_price, close_price, close_reason, realized_pnl, status, opened_at, closed_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{openingOrderId}, #{userId}, #{symbol}, #{sideCode}, #{quantity}, #{entryPrice}, #{leverage}, #{margin}, #{marginModeCode}, #{liquidationPrice}, #{takeProfitPrice}, #{stopLossPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{closeReasonCode}, #{realizedPnl}, #{statusCode}, #{openedAt}, #{closedAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_position SET quantity = #{quantity}, entry_price = #{entryPrice}, leverage = #{leverage}, margin = #{margin}, margin_mode = #{marginModeCode}, liquidation_price = #{liquidationPrice}, take_profit_price = #{takeProfitPrice}, stop_loss_price = #{stopLossPrice}, close_price = #{closePrice}, close_reason = #{closeReasonCode}, realized_pnl = #{realizedPnl}, status = #{statusCode}, closed_at = #{closedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
